task_completion.description: Locate the depth_camera (RangeFinder) node in the Webots scene tree.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Webots application is open, and the Scene Tree panel (usually on the left) is expanded to show the 'MAPPING_ROBOT' node and its 'depth_camera' (RangeFinder) child node.
In the Webots Field Editor panel, the 'width' field is set to 640 and the 'height' field is set to 480 for the 'depth_camera' RangeFinder node.

task_completion.description: Configure the depth_camera range and field of view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots Field Editor panel, the 'maxRange' is set to 10.0, 'minRange' is set to 0.3, and 'fieldOfView' is set to 1.5184 for the 'depth_camera' RangeFinder node.

task_completion.description: Configure the rgb_camera (Camera) resolution and field of view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots Field Editor panel, the 'width' is set to 640, 'height' is set to 480, and 'fieldOfView' is set to 1.2040 for the 'rgb_camera' Camera node.

task_completion.description: Set the rgb_camera translation to co-locate the sensors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots Field Editor panel, the 'translation' field for the 'rgb_camera' is set to X: 0.0, Y: 0.065, Z: 0.0.

task_completion.description: Save the configured world to the specified Desktop path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save World As...' dialog in Webots showing the path '/home/ga/Desktop/rgbd_mapping_robot.wbt', or a file manager/terminal showing the newly created file on the Desktop.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Webots GUI to modify the robot parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Webots Scene Tree and Field Editor, rather than the agent opening the .wbt file in a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) to manually type the values.

integrity.description: Verify the agent modified the existing MAPPING_ROBOT rather than creating a new one.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Scene Tree should clearly show the modifications being made under the pre-existing 'MAPPING_ROBOT' node.

integrity.description: Verify the world was saved using the Webots application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Webots 'File' menu or 'Save World As' dialog should be visible, indicating the agent used the application's native save functionality.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target output path: /home/ga/Desktop/rgbd_mapping_robot.wbt. depth_camera (RangeFinder) specs: width=640, height=480, maxRange=10.0, minRange=0.3, fieldOfView=1.5184. rgb_camera (Camera) specs: width=640, height=480, fieldOfView=1.204. rgb_camera translation: [0.0, 0.065, 0.0].
